heading: Funds available for expenses of advisory committees
label: 2233 Funds available for expenses of advisory committees
text: Funds available for carrying out the activities of the Department of Agriculture shall be available for expenses of advisory committees, including travel expenses in accordance with the provisions of .section 5703 of title 5
notes: Codification“” substituted in text for “section 5 of the Administrative Expenses Act of 1946, as amended” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.Section 5703 of title 5Pub.
